answers.q1_offer: The Daybreak Method — a 30-day morning-discipline course
answers.q2_price_promise: $149; calm, owned mornings and a first deep-work block within 30 days
answers.q3_pains: waking already behind; a privately broken promise to rise; kids learning the snooze
answers.q4_people: founders, parents, creators, and leaders who want calm and output
answers.q5_goods: 30 daily audio rituals, 4 live calls, a tracker, a private community, a founder text
answers.q6_founder_story: burned out and always behind; decided one gray dawn; built it for tired builders
answers.q7_brand_colors: deep indigo and warm sunrise amber
answers.q8_representation: 60% Black women, 20% Black men, 15% mixed, 5% other
answers.q11_oto1: The Fast Track Sprint, done-with-you accelerated onboarding, $197, 40 seats
answers.q12_downsell1: The Daybreak Field Notes, recordings-only tier, $47
answers.q13_oto2: The Founders Table Retreat, categorically different in-person weekend, $997, 20 seats
answers.q14_downsell2: The Single Day Pass, one retreat day, $297
